summary: Implemented memory management optimizations: disabled systemd-oomd (earlyoom preferred), enabled zram swap with zstd compression (16GB, priority 5), and tuned VM parameters (swappiness=10, watermark tuning, disabled page-cluster for zram). All 4 phases completed with user verification after each rebuild.

artifacts.summary: Added memory optimization settings: systemd.oomd.enable=false, zramSwap block, boot.kernel.sysctl block
